title: A NASA telescope is falling out of the sky — and the rescue plan is wild
desc: NASA just launched a mission to rescue the Swift space telescope, which has been slowly falling toward Earth since its 2004 launch. Our two AI hosts, Miles the deadpan skeptic and Nova the wild optimist, brawl over whether saving a gamma-ray observatory that has no engine of its own is heroic science or an expensive lost cause. Real news, real chemistry, and zero made-up facts.
